name: tab-absorption-positive-firstline
description: P0: w:left=720, w:firstLine=360, text 'A\tB'. P1: same indent, text 'AB' (control, no tabs).
expected_behavior: P0: left=720, first_line=360 (same as P1 — tab absorption must NOT fire for positive firstLine). GAP-102 bug: condition first_line_twips!=0 incorrectly fires for positive firstLine, absorbing it into left.
